w20: Dedicated CPU with 32 vCPUs, 128GB RAM, and 600GB SSD, excelling in single-core tasks and 135M LLM text generation.
c150: Hetzner Cloud ccx53: Dedicated AMD EPYC Milan CPU, 32 vCPUs, 128GB RAM, 600GB SSD. Strong single-core CPU and 135M LLM text generation.
c200: Hetzner Cloud ccx53 offers dedicated AMD EPYC Milan x86_64 CPUs with 32 vCPUs and 128GB RAM. Features 600GB SSD storage. Delivers top-tier single-core CPU performance and strong LLM text generation for 135M models.
w150: Hetzner Cloud ccx53 is a dedicated CPU server offering an x86_64 AMD EPYC Milan processor. It provides 32 virtual CPUs across 16 physical cores, operating at 2.0 GHz, and is equipped with 128 GB of memory. Local storage is a 600 GB SSD. This server demonstrates top-tier single-core CPU performance, as evidenced by stress-ng benchmarks, and exhibits strong capabilities in zstd decompression and Passmark memory scores. While multi-core CPU performance, general memory bandwidth, and most Geekbench scores are categorized as average, the server achieves top-tier LLM inference speed for text generation using a 135M model. Conversely, LLM inference for text generation with a 70B model shows poor performance. This configuration is well-suited for workloads demanding consistent single-thread execution, such as specific web serving applications, CI/CD pipelines, or data processing tasks that benefit from efficient decompression and dedicated core access.
